rooms.label: 9b
rooms.name: Rotted Corpse
rooms.gm_note: Dead Undertaker (spider venom). Intact scimitar and light crossbow; empty pouch.

rooms.label: 14a
rooms.name: Sloping Tunnel
rooms.gm_note: Empty; north tunnel slopes 20 ft down to 14b.

rooms.label: 14b
rooms.name: Heart in a Box

monsters.name: Sahuagin Baron
monsters.note: petrified statue; animates only if the box is pried from its grasp (DC 20 Athletics)

rooms.gm_note: Floating acid dome falls (2d10/turn, floods 5 ft) if the box opens without the key from 6c. Lead-lined box holds the withered tiefling heart (swaps with the attuner’s heart — instant death).

rooms.label: 9a
rooms.name: Pillared Way
rooms.gm_note: Gem sockets looted; rusted animated-armor remains in the alcove.

rooms.name: Hall of Heroes
rooms.gm_note: Thirty-eight defaced statues; webbed ceiling; three dead giant spiders. Elder rune trap on the east double doors to 16.

rooms.label: 8c
rooms.name: Masters of Disguise
rooms.gm_note: Vampire-posing extortionists; flee to 6 when outmatched. Disguise kits and rations on the table.

rooms.name: Armory
rooms.gm_note: Collapsed weapon racks; ordinary handaxe in the south door; seized sharpening wheel in the south room.

rooms.label: 8a
rooms.name: Hall of the Bone Throne
rooms.gm_note: Wyvern remains and shattered crystal prison. Throne’s serpent armrests animate and bite (poison, DC 13 Con) when someone sits or lifts the seat; hidden compartment is empty.

rooms.label: 8b
rooms.name: Harria's Room

monsters.name: Bandit Captain
monsters.note: Harria; sleeps unless disturbed, flees to 7

monsters.name: Flesh Golem
monsters.note: her guard; she cannot control it if berserk

rooms.gm_note: Clown-painted trunk holds a disguise kit and costumes.

rooms.name: Empty Room
rooms.gm_note: Empty; a good spot for a regional effect of Halaster’s lair.

rooms.name: Cubicle of Skulls
rooms.gm_note: Thousands of harmless skulls avalanche out when the door opens.

rooms.label: 7a
rooms.name: Hall of Retreat
rooms.gm_note: Undertakers’ fallback: Uktarl and Harria make a final stand here if routed. Companion: they yield rather than die; will trade dungeon info for their lives.

rooms.name: Room of Secrets
rooms.gm_note: Wear the copper helm while sitting on the copper throne: a wand of secrets drops from the ceiling.

rooms.label: 7b
rooms.name: Crypt
rooms.gm_note: Old vampire lair, long vacant. Coffin with mist-hole holds only a vial of holy water.
